questions.question:
A persistent volume diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `reclaim-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `pv-reclaim-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetPvc` is `reports-data`
- `pvcInventory` is `kubectl get pvc reports-data -n pv-reclaim-lab -o wide`
- `volumeNameCheck` is `kubectl get pvc reports-data -n pv-reclaim-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.volumeName}'`
- `storageClassCheck` is `kubectl get pvc reports-data -n pv-reclaim-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.storageClassName}'`
- `reclaimPolicyCheck` is `kubectl get pv reports-pv -o jsonpath='{.spec.persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy}'`
- `claimRefCheck` is `kubectl get pv reports-pv -o jsonpath='{.spec.claimRef.namespace}/{.spec.claimRef.name}'`
- `mountPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment reports-db -n pv-reclaim-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[0].mountPath}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n pv-reclaim-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm PVC binding, PV reclaim policy, claimRef, and workload mount path before changing storage manifests`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q2101/reclaim-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q2101/reclaim-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `PVC Inventory`, `PV Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not delete the PVC or PV, do not scale the Deployment, and do not patch the live reclaim policy or claimRef during this drill.

verification.description: The PV reclaim diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended PVC target, exact PVC and PV inspection commands, claimRef evidence, event check, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact PVC inventory, PV reclaim, claimRef, and workload mount inspection commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe PV remediation guidance is removed
